Operational Standards

The Technology Behind Clean

We are not just a cleaning service. Khuvo is a tech-enabled infrastructure maintenance platform.

Verified Professionals

Background-checked, trained, and uniform-wearing specialists equipped with safety harnesses and certified tools.

Eco-Safe Formula

We use only biodegradable, pH-balanced cleaning agents that leave zero harsh chemical runoff on your lawns or roofs.

AR-Coating Protection

Scratch-free specialized microfiber brushes protect the anti-reflective coating on solar panels, securing peak longevity.

Water Efficient Tech

Advanced spray guns and sludge suction pumps save up to 70% water compared to standard garden hose manual washes.

Same-Day Dispatch

Urgent cleanup requests accepted. Instant mobile slots and on-site dispatcher tracking on booking confirmation.

No Hidden Costs

Upfront pricing calculations with direct digital quotes. You only pay for active services and verified results.

Photo-Proof Audits

Technicians upload before and after high-res photographs of your solar panels, tanks, or vehicle to guarantee results.

Industrial Machinery

High-pressure washer systems, demineralization kits, and deep tank scrub vacuum units operated under strict safety codes.

Customer Reviews

What Modern India Says

Read certified case study accounts from our residential, society, and B2B fleet customers.

Solar Panel Detailing

"Our 10kW rooftop solar system output had collapsed by 30% due to dust storm layers. Khuvo dispatched two certified specialists within 4 hours. They used specialized soft-brush demineralized water washes. Output popped back to 100% instantly! Meticulous digital reporting too."

Amitabh ChaturvediResidential Solar & Villa Owner • Lucknow
FAQ Directory

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know about the science, scheduling, and billing behind Khuvo.

Absolutely not. We never use hard abrasives or metal scrubbers. Khuvo uses specialized demineralized soft water and zero-scratch microfiber brush heads specifically engineered to preserve the solar anti-reflective (AR) coating.

Khuvo is a tech-enabled, premium property maintenance and ecological cleaning platform. We streamline certified solar grid washing, sterilized tank cleaning, and doorstep vehicle care.
